channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Mick Jagger admits idea of a Rolling Stones biopic “interests” him
item.description: 🎸 Mick Jagger getting ready to rock the big screen with a Rolling Stones biopic? We're all ears! 🎥 #RockLegends #StayTuned

item.title: Stevie Nicks Will Be at Taylor Swift’s Wedding — And Might Perform
item.description: Wedding bells ringin' with Stevie Nicks at Taylor Swift's big day! 🎶🔔 Can you feel the magic in the air? #DreamCollab

item.title: heavens to betsy Announce US Reunion Tour Dates
item.description: Guess who's back?! 🎉🎸 The legends @heavenstobetsy are hitting the road in the US! 🔥 #HeavensToBetsyReunionTour 🚗💨

item.title: Lorde Marks Virgin Anniversary With XRAYS Demos And Behind-The-Scenes Photos
item.description: 🎉 Celebrating with Lorde! Dive into the XRAYS demos and exclusive behind-the-scenes snaps 📸🎶 #Lorde #XRAYS #AnniversaryVibes

item.title: Wilco, Billy Bragg, & Natalie Merchant Performed Mermaid Avenue Live For The First Time At Solid Sound
item.description: 🌟 Mermaid Avenue magic! Wilco, Billy Bragg, and Natalie Merchant unite for a historic Solid Sound performance 🎶 #SolidSound #MermaidAvenue
